data: The inscription is written along the upper, right and lower edges of the loculus rim, which is covered by two large tiles, on the surface of the right hand of which is a chi-rho and an X.

Italy Sicily Siracusa Ancient Greek stone

The inscription is written along the upper, right and lower edges of the loculus rim, which is covered by two large tiles, on the surface of the right hand of which is a chi-rho and an X.
